## Wasteland Beast Mercenaries

You can field only up to 1 type of BEAST Mercenary from this list for every Outland Beast Master you also field. A Necromunda Gang (Ash Waste Nomads) can field 1 additional type of BEAST Mercenary from this list.

#### 0-2 Outland Beast Master (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Outland Beast Master | 7”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Outland Beast Master is equipped with Standard Armour, an Automatic Shotgun, and a Shock Stave. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Automatic Shotgun.** 12”, \+1 DICE, SHOTGUN, ASSAULT, TWO-HANDED  
* **Shock Stave.** Melee, BLOCK, STUN, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Beast Tamer.** Friendly BEAST models within 6” of the Outland Beast Master have \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-2 Borewyrm Swarm (Cost: 2 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Borewyrm Swarm | 5”/Burrow | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Borewyrm Swarm is equipped with its Vicious Jaws. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Vicious Jaws.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR

**Abilities**

* **Evasive.** Enemy models never get free attacks against the Borewyrm Swarm when it Retreats, and the Borewyrm Swarm can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, BURROW, DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL), NO PROMOTION, SWARM

#### 0-1 Giant Grapplehawk (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Giant Grapplehawk | 8”/Flying | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Giant Grapplehawk is equipped with tough feathers and its Massive Talons. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Massive Talons.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Grapple.** Enemies cannot Retreat from the Giant Grapplehawk and enemies within 1” of it cannot stand up from Down.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-3 Giant Wasteland Rat (Cost: 2 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Giant Wasteland Rat | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Giant Wasteland Rat is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

**Abilities**

* **Dodge.** All attacks against the Giant Wasteland Rat have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Expendable.** The Giant Wasteland Rat is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Never More Than One Metre From A Rat.** If this model is a casualty, you can replace it for free.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-3 Millisaur (Cost: 2 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Millisaur | 6”/Burrow | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Millisaur is equipped with armoured hide and its Fanged Maw. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Fanged Maw.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Keywords**  
BEAST, BURROW, DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL)

#### 0-3 Ripperjack (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ripperjack | 8”/Flying | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ripperjack is equipped with armoured hide and its Teeth. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Teeth.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER

**Abilities**

* **Enveloping.** Enemies cannot Retreat from the Ripperjack.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FLYING, INFILTRATE, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Ambull (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ambull | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ambull is equipped with chitin armour and two Enormous Claws. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Enormous Claw.** Melee, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 1

**Abilities**

* **Frenzy.** When the Ambull is taken Out of Action, or its TOUGH Keyword prevents it from being taken Out of Action, it can make a single melee attack before being removed or suffering the result.  
* **Massive Beast.** Injury rolls made against the Ambull have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL), LARGE, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH
